creator: roam@orbitel.bg
text:
Could you try to find an old distfile, with the checksum as in the ports
tree, and do a 'diff' to see what changed to change the checksum?

G'luck,
Peter

-- 
.siht ekil ti gnidaer eb d'uoy ,werbeH ni erew ecnetnes siht fI

On Wed, Apr 04, 2001 at 04:36:11AM -0000, mitsuru@riken.go.jp wrote:
> 
> >Number:         26337
> >Category:       ports
> >Synopsis:       japanese/texinfo md5 changed
> >Originator:     Mitsuru Yoshida
> >Release:        FreeBSD 4.3-BETA i386
> >Organization:
> RIKEN
> >Environment:
> System: FreeBSD 4.3-BETA FreeBSD
> 
> 
> >Description:
> 	japanese/texinfo texinfo-4.0-j.diff.gz md5 changed
> >How-To-Repeat:
> 	
> >Fix:
> 
> diff -ruN texinfo.bak/distinfo texinfo/distinfo
> --- texinfo.bak/distinfo	Fri Dec 10 14:48:00 1999
> +++ texinfo/distinfo	Wed Apr  4 12:26:41 2001
> @@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
>  MD5 (texinfo-4.0.tar.gz) = 070493baeb2c277c34575b0df4e2baf1
> -MD5 (texinfo-4.0-j.diff.gz) = 8ffb70f617d1f92c53666c67c6e3479b
> +MD5 (texinfo-4.0-j.diff.gz) = acefde3a4793ba7c776f929c3a4524dd
